data.value: 品番、品名、仕様、バーコード、分類、単位を含む品目基本情報リストを印刷

data.name: Report.ItemDetailDesc
data.value: 仕様、バーコード、分類、単位、仕入種別、原価・定価等を含む品目の完全な詳細情報を1ブロック毎に印刷

data.name: Report.ItemBarcodeDesc
data.value: 品目バーコードを印刷

data.name: Report.BOMReportDesc
data.value: 配合別に部品品番、品名、数量、単位、原価を表示する品目BOM物料リストを印刷

data.name: Report.ProductionScheduleDesc
data.value: スケジュール項目、数量、状態、予定日等の明細を含む生産スケジュールを照会

data.name: Report.InventoryStatusDesc
data.value: 現有在庫、引当済在庫、利用可能在庫および在庫金額を含む各倉庫の現在庫状況を照会

data.name: Report.InventoryTransactionDesc
data.value: 在庫の入出庫異動記録明細を照会

data.name: Report.InventoryCountDesc
data.value: 棚卸別に各品目のシステム在庫、実地棚卸数、差異金額を表示し、差異項目のみのフィルタをサポート

data.name: Report.VehicleListDesc
data.value: ナンバープレート、車名、車型、メーカー、担当者、保険満了日等を含む車両基本情報リストを印刷

data.name: Report.VehicleMaintenanceDesc
data.value: メンテナンス種別、日付、走行距離、費用、整備工場等の明細を含む車両整備記録を印刷

data.name: Report.EquipmentListDesc
data.value: 設備コード、名称、カテゴリ、ブランド、型番、設置場所、担当者、次回保守日等を含む設備基本データ一覧を印刷

data.name: Report.EquipmentMaintenanceRecordDesc
data.value: 保守種別、日付、費用、サービス業者、実施担当者等の明細を含む設備保守記録を印刷

data.name: Report.EmployeeRosterDesc
data.value: 社員番号、氏名、部署、役職、入社日、在籍状況等を含む社員基本情報リストを印刷

data.name: Report.EmployeeDetailDesc
data.value: 連絡先情報、緊急連絡先、在籍情報等を含む社員の完全な詳細情報を1ブロック毎に印刷

data.name: Report.ScaleRecordDesc
data.value: 計量タイプ別に車番、顧客、入庫倉庫、重量、費用明細を含む計量記録リストを印刷

data.name: Report.AccountsReceivableSetoffDesc
data.value: 顧客情報、相殺明細、入金記録を含む売掛金相殺伝票を印刷

data.name: Report.AccountsPayableSetoffDesc
data.value: 仕入先情報、相殺明細、支払記録を含む買掛金相殺伝票を印刷

data.name: Report.AccountItemListDesc
data.value: 勘定科目大類別にグループ化し、勘定コード、名称、階層、借方/貸方方向等を表示する勘定科目表を印刷

data.name: Report.TrialBalanceDesc
data.value: 転記済み伝票の科目別当期借方・貸方発生額と期末累計残高を集計し、借貸平衡を検証

data.name: Report.IncomeStatementDesc
data.value: 指定期間の営業収益・原価・費用を集計し、売上総利益、営業損益、税前損益を計算

data.name: Report.BalanceSheetDesc
data.value: 基準日時点の資産・負債・純資産の累計残高を集計（資産 = 負債 + 純資産）

data.name: Report.GeneralLedgerDesc
data.value: 科目大類別にグループ化したすべての勘定の勘定カードを表示し、各科目に転記済み伝票明細・期首残高・流水残高・期末残高を表示

data.name: Report.SubsidiaryLedgerDesc
data.value: 勘定コード・名称キーワードで特定勘定のカードを照会し、転記済み伝票明細と流水残高を表示。顧客別売掛金、仕入先別買掛金等の明細確認に適する

data.name: Report.DetailAccountBalanceDesc
data.value: 各科目の期首残高、当期借方・貸方発生額、期末残高を集計（逐筆明細なし）、各科目の残高変動を素早く把握するのに適する

data.name: Report.ARAgingAnalysisDesc
data.value: 出荷日＋得意先支払日数で期日を算出し、各エイジング区間（未到来/1-30/31-60/61-90/91-120/121日超）の未収金額を得意先別に集計

data.name: Report.APAgingAnalysisDesc
data.value: 入荷日＋仕入先支払日数で期日を算出し、各エイジング区間（未到来/1-30/31-60/61-90/91-120/121日超）の未払金額を仕入先別に集計

data.name: Report.CashFlowDesc
data.value: IAS 7間接法でキャッシュフロー計算書を作成。当期純利益を起点に、非現金調整・運転資本変動を加減算し、営業・投資・財務活動の現金収支を集計

data.name: Placeholder.SelectWarehouseFirst
data.value: 先に倉庫を選択してください

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Description
data.value: 販売注文は、顧客が注文した品目、数量、金額を記録します。作成後、承認、納品書の印刷、出荷や返品への変換が可能です。

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Step1
data.value: 顧客を選択：顧客フィールドから注文顧客を検索・選択

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Step2
data.value: 注文情報を入力：注文日、税区分などの基本情報を設定

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Step3
data.value: 明細を追加：明細タブで品目、数量、単価を入力

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Step4
data.value: 金額を確認：合計金額と税額が正しいか確認

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Step5
data.value: 保存または承認申請：保存ボタンをクリック、または承認フローに提出

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Field.Customer
data.value: この注文の顧客を選択すると、関連データが自動入力されます

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Field.OrderDate
data.value: 注文作成日、デフォルトは本日、手動変更可能

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Field.TaxMethod
data.value: 税計算方式を選択（税込、税抜、免税）、明細金額の計算に影響します

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Tip1
data.value: 見積書から直接インポートでき、注文明細が自動入力され、重複入力を節約できます。

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Warning1
data.value: 承認後は注文内容を変更できません。承認申請前にすべてのデータを確認してください。

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Detail1
data.value: 「追加」ボタンで品目を追加 — 各行に品名、数量、単価を入力

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Detail2
data.value: 品名フィールドはスマート検索対応 — キーワードで素早く検索可能

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Detail3
data.value: 数量と単価を入力すると、小計が自動計算されます

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Detail4
data.value: ドラッグで順序変更、削除ボタンで品目を削除できます

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Approval1
data.value: 注文作成後に承認申請が可能、承認後に出荷作業を進められます

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Approval2
data.value: 承認済み注文は納品書の印刷や出荷記録への変換が可能です

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Approval3
data.value: 承認済み注文を修正するには、まず却下操作が必要です（却下権限が必要）

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Faq1Q
data.value: 見積書からインポートするには？

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Faq1A
data.value: アクションボタンの「見積インポート」をクリックし、見積書を選択すると明細が自動入力されます。

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Faq2Q
data.value: 保存できないのはなぜ？

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Faq2A
data.value: 顧客が選択され、最低1つの明細品目があり、必須フィールドがすべて入力されているか確認してください。

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Faq3Q
data.value: 下書き機能の使い方は？

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Faq3A
data.value: 「下書き保存」をクリックすると未完成の注文を保存できます。下書きは承認フローに入らず、いつでも編集可能です。

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Warning2
data.value: 税区分を変更すると全明細の金額が再計算されます — 変更後にご確認ください。

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Warning3
data.value: 出荷実績のある明細は削除できません — 先に関連する出荷伝票を処理してください。

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.TabOverview
data.value: このページには3つのタブがあります：「注文データ」で基本情報と明細を入力、「顧客情報」で選択した顧客の詳細を確認、「写真」で注文関連の画像をアップロードできます。

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Step6
data.value: 後続作業：承認後、出荷伝票への変換または生産スケジュールの手配が可能です

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Field.Code
data.value: システムが自動生成（SO＋日付＋連番）、手動編集不可

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Field.Company
data.value: この注文が属する会社を選択します。複数会社環境では必須

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Field.Salesperson
data.value: この注文の担当営業。営業実績の集計に影響します

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Field.FormCreator
data.value: この注文を作成した担当者。営業担当と異なる場合があります

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Field.ExpectedDeliveryDate
data.value: 顧客が希望する納品日。スケジューリングと出荷時に参照されます

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Field.PaymentTerms
data.value: 支払方法と条件、例：「月末締め30日払い」「代金引換」

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Field.DeliveryTerms
data.value: 納品方法と場所、例：「顧客倉庫へ配送」「顧客引取り」

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Field.Remarks
data.value: 補足説明や特別な要望。印刷帳票にも表示されます

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Field.TotalAmount
data.value: 全明細の小計合計（税抜）。システムが自動計算します

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Field.DiscountAmount
data.value: 全明細の値引き合計。各品目の割引率から自動計算されます

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Field.SalesTaxAmount
data.value: 税区分と税率に基づいて自動計算された税額。内税方式では総額から逆算されます

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Field.TotalAmountWithTax
data.value: 最終請求額 ＝ 合計 ＋ 税額。顧客が実際に支払う金額です

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Detail5
data.value: 各明細に割引率を設定でき、システムが割引後の小計を自動計算します

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Detail6
data.value: 出荷実績のある品目は出荷済数量と未出荷数量が表示され、削除できません

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Action.Convert
data.value: 承認済み注文を出荷伝票に変換。未出荷の品目と数量が自動反映されます

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Action.Schedule
data.value: 注文品目の生産スケジュールを確認・計画できます（承認後のみ利用可能）

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Action.Inventory
data.value: 全品目のリアルタイム在庫を確認。在庫不足時はボタンが黄色の警告表示になります

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Action.Print
data.value: 販売注文のプレビューと印刷。PDF・Excelエクスポートに対応

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Action.Draft
data.value: 未完成の注文を下書き保存。下書きは承認フローに入らず、いつでも編集可能です

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Approval4
data.value: システム管理者がシステムパラメータで自動承認または手動承認を設定できます

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Tip2
data.value: 金額フィールドはすべてシステムが自動計算します。明細変更後に即時更新されます。

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Tip3
data.value: 「顧客情報」タブで選択した顧客の連絡先情報をこのページから直接確認できます。

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Faq4Q
data.value: 一部のフィールドが編集できないのはなぜですか？

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Faq4A
data.value: 注文に明細がある場合、顧客・会社・日付等の基本フィールドはロックされ、明細データとの不整合を防ぎます。

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Faq5Q
data.value: 出荷進捗はどこで確認できますか？

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Faq5A
data.value: 各明細で「出荷済数量」と「未出荷数量」を確認できます。「在庫チェック」ボタンで全品目の状況を一覧できます。

data.name: Guide.Quotation.Description
data.value: Quotations provide item pricing to customers. Once confirmed, they can be converted into sales orders.

data.name: Guide.Quotation.TabOverview
data.value: Three tabs: Quotation Data, Customer Info, Photos.

data.name: Guide.Quotation.Step2
data.value: Fill basic info: date, tax type, project name

data.name: Guide.Quotation.Step3
data.value: Add line items with quantities and prices

data.name: Guide.Quotation.Field.Customer
data.value: Select the customer for this quotation

data.name: Guide.Quotation.Field.Subtotal
data.value: Sum of items before discount; auto-calculated

data.name: Guide.Quotation.Action.Convert
data.value: Convert to sales order; auto-populates unconverted items

data.name: Guide.Quotation.Action.Print
data.value: Preview and print; supports PDF and Excel

data.name: Guide.Quotation.Action.Draft
data.value: Save as draft; won't enter approval

data.name: Guide.Quotation.Tip1
data.value: Can convert multiple times; each brings remaining quantities.

data.name: Guide.Quotation.Tip2
data.value: Set project name to search related quotations by project.

data.name: Guide.Quotation.Warning1
data.value: Fields locked after approval or conversion.

data.name: Guide.Quotation.Warning2
data.value: Deleting converted items may affect related orders.

data.name: Guide.Quotation.Faq1Q
data.value: Can convert to orders multiple times?

data.name: Guide.Quotation.Faq1A
data.value: Yes, each time brings unconverted remaining quantities.

data.name: Guide.Quotation.Faq2A
data.value: Ensure saved, approved, and has unconverted items.

data.name: Guide.Quotation.Faq3Q
data.value: How to edit an approved quotation?

data.name: Guide.Quotation.Faq3A
data.value: An authorized user must reject it first.

data.name: Guide.SalesDelivery.Description
data.value: Delivery notes record items delivered to customers. Usually from sales orders.

data.name: Guide.SalesDelivery.TabOverview
data.value: Two tabs: Delivery Data and Customer Info.

data.name: Guide.SalesDelivery.Tip1
data.value: Details show source order info for tracking.

data.name: Guide.SalesDelivery.Tip2
data.value: Use filters to import from specific orders.

data.name: Guide.SalesDelivery.Warning1
data.value: Items with returns cannot be deleted.

data.name: Guide.SalesDelivery.Faq1Q
data.value: Can include items from multiple orders?

data.name: Guide.SalesDelivery.Faq1A
data.value: Yes, use filters to select different orders.

data.name: Guide.SalesDelivery.Faq2Q
data.value: Why can't I delete some items?

data.name: Guide.SalesDelivery.Faq2A
data.value: Items with return/setoff records cannot be deleted.

data.name: Guide.SalesDelivery.Faq3A
data.value: Click Convert to Return; system auto-populates returnable items.

data.name: Guide.SalesReturn.Description
data.value: Sales returns record items returned by customers. Can create setoffs for refunds.

data.name: Guide.SalesReturn.TabOverview
data.value: Two tabs: Return Data and Customer Info.

data.name: Guide.SalesReturn.Step4
data.value: Enter return quantities and verify amounts

data.name: Guide.SalesReturn.Warning1
data.value: Items with setoff records cannot be modified.

data.name: Guide.SalesReturn.Warning2
data.value: Return qty cannot exceed delivered minus returned.

data.name: Guide.SalesReturn.Faq1A
data.value: Cannot exceed delivered minus already returned.

data.name: Guide.PurchaseOrder.Description
data.value: Purchase orders record procurement requests to suppliers. Convert to receiving after approval.

data.name: Guide.PurchaseOrder.TabOverview
data.value: Two tabs: PO Data and Supplier Info.

data.name: Guide.PurchaseOrder.Action.Convert
data.value: Convert to receiving; auto-populates unreceived items

data.name: Guide.PurchaseOrder.Action.CopyMsg
data.value: Format order as text for messaging to supplier

data.name: Guide.PurchaseOrder.Tip1
data.value: Copy Message supports custom templates via gear icon.

data.name: Guide.PurchaseOrder.Tip2
data.value: Expected date defaults to 7 days after order date.

data.name: Guide.PurchaseOrder.Warning2
data.value: Items with receiving records cannot be deleted.

data.name: Guide.PurchaseOrder.Faq1Q
data.value: How to quickly order from supplier?

data.name: Guide.PurchaseOrder.Faq1A
data.value: Use Copy Message to send via messaging app.

data.name: Guide.PurchaseOrder.Faq2A
data.value: Yes, each conversion brings unreceived quantities.

data.name: Guide.PurchaseOrder.Faq3A
data.value: Fields lock when approved or has receiving records.

data.name: Guide.PurchaseReceiving.Description
data.value: Receiving notes record items received from suppliers. Can specify warehouses and batch numbers.

data.name: Guide.PurchaseReceiving.TabOverview
data.value: Two tabs: Receiving Data and Supplier Info.

data.name: Guide.PurchaseReceiving.Step3
data.value: Use Smart Load to import items

data.name: Guide.PurchaseReceiving.Step5
data.value: Save and approve; items stocked on approval

data.name: Guide.PurchaseReceiving.Detail1
data.value: Smart Load imports unreceived PO items

data.name: Guide.PurchaseReceiving.Detail2
data.value: Verify actual received qty per item

data.name: Guide.PurchaseReceiving.Detail3
data.value: Assign warehouses; use Unify Warehouse for batch setting

data.name: Guide.PurchaseReceiving.Tip1
data.value: Unify Warehouse sets all items to same warehouse.

data.name: Guide.PurchaseReceiving.Tip2
data.value: Received qty can differ from ordered; system tracks difference.

data.name: Guide.PurchaseReceiving.Warning1
data.value: Items with returns/setoffs cannot be deleted.

data.name: Guide.PurchaseReceiving.Faq1A
data.value: Yes, remaining can be imported next time.

data.name: Guide.PurchaseReceiving.Faq2A
data.value: Manually add items; not required from PO.

data.name: Guide.PurchaseReturn.Description
data.value: Purchase returns record items returned to suppliers. Can create setoffs for deductions.

data.name: Guide.PurchaseReturn.TabOverview
data.value: Two tabs: Return Data and Supplier Info.

data.name: Guide.PurchaseReturn.Step4
data.value: Enter return quantities and verify amounts

data.name: Guide.PurchaseReturn.Warning1
data.value: Items with setoff records cannot be modified.

data.name: Guide.PurchaseReturn.Warning2
data.value: Return qty cannot exceed received minus returned.

data.name: Guide.PurchaseReturn.Faq1A
data.value: Cannot exceed received minus already returned.

data.name: Guide.Unit.Description
data.value: Unit management defines measurement units for items (e.g., PC, BOX, KG).

data.name: Guide.Unit.Field.Code
data.value: Unit code, e.g., PCS, BOX, KG

data.name: Guide.Size.Description
data.value: Size management defines item specifications (e.g., S, M, L, XL).

data.name: Guide.ItemCategory.Description
data.value: Item categories organize items by type (e.g., raw materials, finished goods) for search and reporting.

data.name: Guide.ItemCategory.Field.IsSaleable
data.value: When checked, items in this category appear in sales documents

data.name: Guide.CompositionCategory.Description
data.value: Composition categories organize BOM recipes by product line.

data.name: Guide.SalesReturnReason.Description
data.value: Predefined return reason options (e.g., defective, quantity mismatch) for sales return documents.

data.name: Guide.SalesTarget.Description
data.value: Set monthly sales targets per salesperson for dashboard tracking.

data.name: Guide.PurchaseReturnReason.Description
data.value: Predefined return reason options (e.g., poor quality, spec mismatch) for purchase returns.

data.name: Guide.Department.Description
data.value: Department management builds the organization hierarchy with manager and parent-child relationships.

data.name: Guide.EmployeePosition.Description
data.value: Position management defines job titles (e.g., Manager, Engineer).

data.name: Guide.Role.Description
data.value: Role management defines system roles with configurable permission sets.

data.name: Guide.Permission.Description
data.value: Permission viewer showing all system-defined permissions. Read-only — permissions are auto-generated.

data.name: Guide.VehicleType.Description
data.value: Vehicle type management categorizes vehicles (e.g., truck, van, refrigerated).

data.name: Guide.ScaleType.Description
data.value: Scale type management defines material types for weighing operations, linkable to items for auto-pricing.

data.name: Guide.ScaleType.Field.Item
data.value: Related item for auto unit price

data.name: Guide.Bank.Description
data.value: Bank management maintains bank info including codes and SWIFT codes for bank account setup.

data.name: Guide.Currency.Description
data.value: Currency management defines supported currencies and exchange rates for multi-currency operations.

data.name: Guide.Currency.Field.IsBase
data.value: Set as base currency (rate fixed at 1)

data.name: Guide.Currency.Field.Rate
data.value: Exchange rate relative to base currency

data.name: Guide.PaymentMethod.Description
data.value: Payment method management defines payment options (e.g., cash, transfer, check).

data.name: Guide.DocumentCategory.Description
data.value: Document categories organize company documents (e.g., contracts, forms) with default access levels.

data.name: Guide.DocumentCategory.Field.AccessLevel
data.value: Default access level for documents in this category

data.name: Guide.EquipmentCategory.Description
data.value: Equipment categories organize equipment types (e.g., production, office, transport).

data.name: Guide.Warehouse.Description
data.value: Warehouse management maintains warehouse info. Warehouse locations can be set up for detailed inventory tracking.

data.name: Guide.Warehouse.Tip1
data.value: After creating a warehouse, add locations in edit mode for detailed inventory management.

data.name: Guide.WarehouseLocation.Description
data.value: Warehouse location management defines storage positions (zone, aisle, level, position) within warehouses.

data.name: Guide.Company.Description
data.value: Company management maintains enterprise info including tax ID, address, and contacts. Multi-company environments can switch operating company.

data.name: Guide.Company.TabOverview
data.value: Multiple tabs: Company Data, Company Logo, Bank Accounts.

data.name: Guide.Company.Field.IsDefault
data.value: Set as default; new documents auto-use this company

data.name: Guide.Company.Tip1
data.value: Setting as default company auto-fills company info on all new documents.

data.name: Guide.PaperSetting.Description
data.value: Paper settings define print paper specs including size, orientation, and margins for report printing.

data.name: Guide.PaperSetting.Tip1
data.value: Use the 'Query Paper' button to quickly apply common paper specs (A4, A5, B5, etc.).

data.name: Guide.ReportPrintConfiguration.Description
data.value: Report print config assigns paper settings to each report for correct print formatting.

data.name: Guide.TextMessageTemplate.Description
data.value: Message template management customizes the 'Copy Message' format for purchase orders.

data.name: Guide.TextMessageTemplate.Step1
data.value: Set header text: Enter fixed text at the beginning

data.name: Guide.TextMessageTemplate.Step2
data.value: Select detail columns: Check which item fields to include

data.name: Guide.TextMessageTemplate.Step3
data.value: Set footer text: Enter closing remarks

data.name: Guide.PayrollItem.Description
data.value: Payroll items define salary calculation components (e.g., base salary, overtime, insurance deductions).

data.name: Guide.PayrollPeriod.Description
data.value: Payroll periods define salary calculation time ranges, typically monthly.

data.name: Guide.InsuranceRate.Description
data.value: Insurance rate management maintains labor and health insurance rates for auto-calculating employer and employee contributions.

data.name: Guide.HealthInsuranceGrade.Description
data.value: Health insurance grade table maintains NHI insured salary grades for health insurance calculation.

data.name: Guide.LaborInsuranceGrade.Description
data.value: Labor insurance grade table maintains insured salary grades for labor insurance calculation.

data.name: Guide.MinimumWage.Description
data.value: Minimum wage management maintains annual minimum wage standards referenced in salary calculations.

data.name: Guide.WithholdingTaxTable.Description
data.value: Withholding tax table maintains salary income tax withholding lookup tables for auto-calculating tax deductions.

data.name: Guide.EmployeeSalary.Description
data.value: Employee salary settings maintain individual salary structures including base pay and allowances.

data.name: Guide.EmployeeBankAccount.Description
data.value: Employee bank account management maintains salary transfer account information.

data.name: Guide.MonthlyAttendanceSummary.Description
data.value: Monthly attendance summary records employee attendance stats including work days and overtime hours for payroll.

data.name: Guide.Item.Description
data.value: Item management maintains all products, raw materials, and semi-finished goods.

data.name: Guide.Item.TabOverview
data.value: Multiple tabs: Item Data, Accounting, Photos.

data.name: Guide.Item.Tip1
data.value: Set up BOM compositions to define product recipes.

data.name: Guide.Item.Warning1
data.value: Ensure no related orders or stock before deleting.

data.name: Guide.Item.Faq1A
data.value: Use the composition feature from item list right-click menu.

data.name: Guide.Item.Faq2Q
data.value: Why can't item be selected in sales?

data.name: Guide.Item.Faq2A
data.value: Check if the item category has 'Saleable' checked.

data.name: Guide.ItemComposition.Description
data.value: BOM compositions define product recipes and material quantities for production scheduling.

data.name: Guide.ItemComposition.Tip1
data.value: One item can have multiple recipes; select the appropriate one during production.

data.name: Guide.Customer.Description
data.value: Customer management maintains customer info, contacts, and payment terms — core data for sales.

data.name: Guide.Customer.TabOverview
data.value: Multiple tabs: Customer Data, Vehicles, Bank Accounts, Visits, Complaints, Transactions, Accounting.

data.name: Guide.Customer.Tip1
data.value: Copy customer data to create a supplier record in one click.

data.name: Guide.Customer.Warning1
data.value: Ensure no related orders or receivables before deleting.

data.name: Guide.Customer.Faq1Q
data.value: How to also set as supplier?

data.name: Guide.Customer.Faq1A
data.value: Use 'Copy to Supplier' to auto-create supplier record.

data.name: Guide.CustomerVisit.Description
data.value: Customer visit records track salesperson visits for relationship management.

data.name: Guide.CustomerComplaint.Description
data.value: Customer complaint management tracks complaint cases with resolution progress.

data.name: Guide.CustomerBankAccount.Description
data.value: Customer bank account management for payment settlement.

data.name: Guide.Supplier.Description
data.value: Supplier management maintains vendor info, contacts, and payment terms — core data for procurement.

data.name: Guide.Supplier.TabOverview
data.value: Multiple tabs: Supplier Data, Vehicles, Items, Bank Accounts, Visits.

data.name: Guide.Supplier.Tip1
data.value: Copy supplier data to create a customer record in one click.

data.name: Guide.Supplier.Faq1A
data.value: Check the Items tab for all products supplied with pricing.

data.name: Guide.SupplierVisit.Description
data.value: Supplier visit records track vendor visits.

data.name: Guide.SupplierBankAccount.Description
data.value: Supplier bank account management for payment processing.

data.name: Guide.Employee.Description
data.value: Employee management maintains personal info, department, position, and contacts.

data.name: Guide.Employee.TabOverview
data.value: Multiple tabs: Employee Data, Vehicles, Tools, Training, Permissions, Payroll, Photos.

data.name: Guide.Employee.Tip1
data.value: The Permissions tab controls granular module access per employee.

data.name: Guide.Employee.Warning1
data.value: Deactivating an employee account prevents system login.

data.name: Guide.EmployeeLicense.Description
data.value: Employee license management tracks professional certifications with expiry alerts.

data.name: Guide.EmployeeTool.Description
data.value: Employee tool management tracks tools and equipment assigned to employees.

data.name: Guide.EmployeeTrainingRecord.Description
data.value: Employee training records track courses and results.

data.name: Guide.Vehicle.Description
data.value: Vehicle management maintains fleet info including plates, types, and ownership.

data.name: Guide.Vehicle.Tip1
data.value: Vehicles can be linked to employees, customers, or suppliers.

data.name: Guide.VehicleMaintenance.Description
data.value: Vehicle maintenance records track repair and service history.

data.name: Guide.Equipment.Description
data.value: Equipment management maintains company equipment info, status, and value tracking.

data.name: Guide.Equipment.Tip1
data.value: Track maintenance history and next service dates via maintenance records.

data.name: Guide.EquipmentMaintenance.Description
data.value: Equipment maintenance records track repair and service history.

data.name: Guide.CrmLead.Description
data.value: Lead management tracks business opportunities with contact info and estimated values; can convert to customers.

data.name: Guide.CrmLead.Action.Convert
data.value: Convert lead to a formal customer record

data.name: Guide.CrmLead.Tip1
data.value: Use the Follow-up tab to record each contact and plan next steps.

data.name: Guide.CrmLead.Warning1
data.value: Converting to customer is irreversible; the lead is marked as converted.

data.name: Guide.CrmLeadFollowUp.Description
data.value: Lead follow-up records track each contact method, content, and next steps.

data.name: Guide.ScaleRecord.Description
data.value: Scale records capture vehicle weighing data with auto net-weight calculation and printing.

data.name: Guide.ScaleRecord.Action.Read
data.value: Read real-time weight from connected scale device

data.name: Guide.ScaleRecord.Tip1
data.value: Entry and exit weights can be auto-read from scale devices.

data.name: Guide.Document.Description
data.value: Document management for uploading, categorizing, and managing company documents.

data.name: Guide.Document.Tip1
data.value: Multiple file attachments supported in common formats.

data.name: Guide.InventoryStock.Description
data.value: Inventory management for viewing and maintaining stock quantities, locations, and costs.

data.name: Guide.InventoryStock.Tip1
data.value: Stock quantities are usually auto-updated by transactions; manual edits not recommended.

data.name: Guide.InventoryTransaction.Description
data.value: Inventory transaction log is read-only, showing all stock movement history for tracking.

data.name: Guide.MaterialIssue.Description
data.value: Material issue records track materials withdrawn from warehouse for production.

data.name: Guide.MaterialIssue.Tip1
data.value: Can link to production schedules; system auto-calculates required materials from BOM.

data.name: Guide.StockTaking.Description
data.value: Stock taking records physical inventory counts, compares with system stock, and generates difference reports.

data.name: Guide.StockTaking.Tip1
data.value: After counting, one-click adjustment auto-corrects stock differences.

data.name: Guide.StockTaking.Warning1
data.value: Stock adjustments are irreversible; verify carefully before confirming.

data.name: Guide.SetoffDocument.Description
data.value: Setoff documents handle AR/AP settlement including collections, payments, and refunds.

data.name: Guide.SetoffDocument.Tip1
data.value: Usually created via 'Convert to Setoff' from delivery, return, or receiving documents.

data.name: Guide.SetoffDocument.Warning1
data.value: Completed setoffs affect AR/AP balances; verify amounts carefully.

data.name: Guide.BankStatement.Description
data.value: Bank statement management imports bank transaction details for reconciliation.

data.name: Guide.BankStatement.Tip1
data.value: Supports CSV import; imported transactions can be matched one by one.

data.name: Guide.AccountItem.Description
data.value: Chart of accounts management with multi-level hierarchy (assets, liabilities, income, expenses).

data.name: Guide.AccountItem.Tip1
data.value: Sub-accounts auto-roll up to parent accounts in summaries.

data.name: Guide.FiscalPeriod.Description
data.value: Fiscal period management controls accounting period status (open/closed/locked).

data.name: Guide.FiscalPeriod.Warning1
data.value: Closing or locking a period prevents adding or editing journal entries within it.

data.name: Guide.JournalEntry.Description
data.value: Journal entry management creates accounting entries with balanced debit and credit lines.

data.name: Guide.JournalEntry.Tip1
data.value: System checks debit-credit balance in real-time as lines are added.

data.name: Guide.JournalEntry.Warning1
data.value: Entries must be balanced; unbalanced entries cannot be saved.

data.name: Guide.ManufacturingOrder.Description
data.value: Manufacturing order management tracks production schedule execution, quantities, and related material issues.

data.name: Guide.Employee.Tab.EmployeeData
data.value: Enter core personal info, contacts, emergency contacts, department, and position

data.name: Guide.Employee.Tab.VehicleInfo
data.value: Manage company vehicles assigned to this employee; add, edit, or unlink vehicles

data.name: Guide.Employee.Tab.PersonalTools
data.value: Track tools and equipment issued to the employee (laptop, phone, keys, etc.) with assign/return dates

data.name: Guide.Employee.Tab.Training
data.value: Record training courses attended, including course name, hours, organization, and results

data.name: Guide.Employee.Tab.Permissions
data.value: Fine-grained control over which system modules and operations this employee can access

data.name: Guide.Employee.Tab.Payroll
data.value: Maintain this employee's salary structure including base pay and allowances (requires Payroll module)

data.name: Guide.Employee.Tab.BankAccounts
data.value: Maintain salary transfer bank account information for monthly payroll

data.name: Guide.Employee.Tab.Documents
data.value: Manage document attachments related to this employee (requires Documents module)

data.name: Guide.Employee.Field.EnglishName
data.value: English name for international reports and communication

data.name: Guide.Employee.Field.IdNumber
data.value: National ID number for insurance and tax filing

data.name: Guide.Employee.Field.Mobile
data.value: Employee mobile number, primary contact method

data.name: Guide.Employee.Tip2
data.value: Payroll and Bank Account tabs appear only after saving the employee record.

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Tab.OrderData
data.value: Enter order basics (customer, date, tax) and manage order line items with quantities, prices, and discounts

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Tab.CustomerInfo
data.value: View the selected customer's full contact and address info without leaving the order page

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Tab.Photos
data.value: Upload and manage order-related image attachments

data.name: Guide.Quotation.Tab.QuotationData
data.value: Enter quotation basics and manage line items with quantities, prices, and discounts

data.name: Guide.Quotation.Tab.CustomerInfo
data.value: View customer contact details without leaving the quotation page

data.name: Guide.SalesDelivery.Tab.DeliveryData
data.value: Enter delivery basics (customer, date, address) and manage delivery line items

data.name: Guide.SalesDelivery.Tab.CustomerInfo
data.value: View customer contact and address info for delivery confirmation

data.name: Guide.SalesDelivery.Field.FormCreator
data.value: The person who created this delivery note

data.name: Guide.SalesReturn.Tab.ReturnData
data.value: Enter return basics and manage return items; filter from deliveries to import returnable items

data.name: Guide.PurchaseOrder.Tab.OrderData
data.value: Enter PO basics (supplier, date, tax) and manage purchase line items

data.name: Guide.PurchaseOrder.Tab.SupplierInfo
data.value: View selected supplier's contact and payment info

data.name: Guide.PurchaseReceiving.Tab.ReceivingData
data.value: Enter receiving basics and manage details; smart-load items from POs and assign warehouses

data.name: Guide.PurchaseReceiving.Tab.SupplierInfo
data.value: View supplier's contact and payment info

data.name: Guide.PurchaseReturn.Tab.ReturnData
data.value: Enter return basics and manage return items; filter from receiving to import returnable items

data.name: Guide.Customer.Tab.CustomerData
data.value: Enter customer basics, contacts, payment terms, and other core info

data.name: Guide.Customer.Tab.VehicleInfo
data.value: Manage vehicles linked to this customer

data.name: Guide.Customer.Tab.BankAccounts
data.value: Maintain customer bank accounts for payment settlement

data.name: Guide.Customer.Tab.Items
data.value: View customer-specific items and quotation records

data.name: Guide.Customer.Tab.Visits
data.value: Record salesperson visit history with purposes and follow-ups

data.name: Guide.Customer.Tab.Complaints
data.value: Manage complaint cases with resolution tracking

data.name: Guide.Customer.Tab.Transactions
data.value: View transaction history (orders, deliveries, returns, etc.)

data.name: Guide.Supplier.Tab.SupplierData
data.value: Enter supplier basics, contacts, payment terms, and other core info

data.name: Guide.Supplier.Tab.VehicleInfo
data.value: Manage vehicles linked to this supplier

data.name: Guide.Supplier.Tab.BankAccounts
data.value: Maintain supplier bank accounts for payment processing

data.name: Guide.Supplier.Tab.Items
data.value: View items supplied with pricing records

data.name: Guide.Supplier.Tab.Visits
data.value: Record visit history with this supplier

data.name: Guide.Supplier.Tab.Transactions
data.value: View transaction history (POs, receivings, returns, etc.)

data.name: Guide.Item.Tab.ItemData
data.value: Enter item basics, category, unit, specs, and supplier info

data.name: Guide.Item.Tab.Accounting
data.value: Set accounting mappings (sales revenue, COGS, etc.)

data.name: Guide.Item.Field.TaxRate
data.value: Default tax rate, auto-filled when creating documents

data.name: Guide.Company.Tab.CompanyData
data.value: Enter company basics, tax ID, address, and contact info

data.name: Guide.Company.Tab.Logo
data.value: Upload company logo; appears on printed reports and documents

data.name: Guide.Company.Tab.BankAccounts
data.value: Maintain company bank accounts for financial management

data.name: Guide.CrmLead.Tab.LeadInfo
data.value: Enter lead basics, contacts, estimated value, and development stage

data.name: Guide.CrmLead.Tab.FollowUp
data.value: Record each follow-up method, content, and next contact plan

data.value: Lead source channel (web, referral, exhibition, etc.)

data.name: Guide.CrmLead.Field.Stage
data.value: Development stage (initial contact, needs confirmed, quoting, closed, etc.)

data.value: 承認情報フィールドを非表示（全モジュール）

data.name: ApprovalSettings.HideApprovalInfoSectionDesc
data.value: チェックすると、全伝票編集画面で承認状態・承認者・承認日時などのフィールドが非表示になります
